analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states that President Putin will not attend the UN General Assembly in person due to unstable epidemiological conditions in the US and will address the session via video. Evaluation against narratives: RU1 (West immoral/hostile/decadent): The tweet mentions an unstable epidemiological situation in the US but does not moralize, blame, or depict hostility/decadence; it's framed as a practical health-related reason, so RU1 is not promoted. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): No mention of alternative systems, multilateral leadership, or non-Western cooperation; not applicable. RU3 (Russia as benevolent partner): No claims about promoting peace/solidarity or partnership; not applicable. RU4 (Russian history admirable): No historical references; not applicable. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): No boasting of achievements or leadership; not applicable. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature/heritage): Irrelevant; not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet is informational and does not promote any listed narratives.
